instruction:
The U.S. Bureau of the Census conducts nationwide surveys on characteristics of U.S. households. Following are data on the number of people per household for a sample of 50 households. Construct a grouped data table for these household sizes.
$\begin{array}{cccccccccc}\hline 5 & 5 & 4 & 6 & 3 & 1 & 4 & 4 & 4 & 5 \\ \hline 4 & 3 & 4 & 3 & 3 & 4 & 4 & 1 & 2 & 3 \\ \hline 4 & 4 & 4 & 2 & 4 & 5 & 5 & 3 & 1 & 2 \\ \hline 3 & 1 & 3 & 6 & 6 & 4 & 2 & 3 & 6 & 2 \\ \hline 2 & 2 & 2 & 3 & 2 & 4 & 4 & 2 & 1 & 4 \\ \hline \end{array}$
$\begin{array}{ccc}\hline Household size & Frequency & Relative Frequency \\ \hline 1 & [ANS] & [ANS] \\ \hline 2 & [ANS] & [ANS] \\ \hline 3 & [ANS] & [ANS] \\ \hline 4 & [ANS] & [ANS] \\ \hline 5 & [ANS] & [ANS] \\ \hline 6 & [ANS] & [ANS] \\ \hline 7 & [ANS] & [ANS] \\ \hline Total & 50 & 1 \\ \hline \end{array}$
